raw_output_payload.reasoning:
We need a bash command that prints summary of new/missing files and which files differ between two directories, sorted alphabetically. Use diff -qr and then process. Maybe:

diff -qr /system/folder1 /system/folder2 | sort

But need summary of new/missing and differing. diff -qr gives lines like "Only in ..." and "Files ... differ". So command: diff -qr /system/folder1 /system/folder2 | sort

Return that.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content:
We need a bash command that prints summary of new/missing files and which files differ between two directories, sorted alphabetically. Use diff -qr and then process. Maybe:

diff -qr /system/folder1 /system/folder2 | sort

But need summary of new/missing and differing. diff -qr gives lines like "Only in ..." and "Files ... differ". So command: diff -qr /system/folder1 /system/folder2 | sort

Return that.
